title: Player Size Changer
description: This is a datapack with which you can change your size between 5 different sizes. Each one of them also changes other attributes like health or range accordingly.
body:
# Player size changer
This is a datapack with which you can change you size in minecraft.
Accordingly to your size other attributes like health, range, jump hight and some more will change too. For example, if you are small you can move better, but you have less life and can jump lower. On the other hand, if you are big you have a lot of lives and can jump higher, but you can no longer fit everywhere!

There are currently 5 different sizes:
- Very small (0.2x)
- Small (0.5x)
- Normal (1x)
- Large (2x)
- Very large (4x)


To change you size, you have 3 options:

1. [Recommended] You can change your size by opening the change size menu in the pause screen of the game:
![Picture of the minecraft pause screen with the button "change size" marked in red.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49cf033ffcaca0b45452c4c4a409c2bce93dc624_0.webp)
Press on "Change Size" (here marked in red) and the following menu will open where you'll be able to change your own size:
![Picture showing the change your size menu with five differrent options to change the players size.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b6148c19909ccfa39c3c06160d10f54ec93c0e9_0.webp)

2. If clicking the change size button opens a menu from a mod (like Mod Menu), you'll have to use the following command to manually open the menu:

```
/dialog show @s size:change-size
```

3. If you are using an earlier version of minecraft or of the datapack/mod, your only option is to use the following commands to change your size:


```
/function size:0.2x
```



```
/function size:0.5x
```



```
/function size:1x
```



```
/function size:2x
```



```
/function size:4x
```
